title: Alekz
description: A website created for a clothing designer.
longDescription: Alekz is a modern portofolio website created for a clothing designer. The website showcases latest collections, provides information about the designer, and offers a contact form for potential clients. The design is sleek and minimalist, focusing on high-quality images to highlight the designer's work.

title: Bookspace
description: A webapp created, where users can read and write reviews about books.
longDescription: Bookspace is a community-driven platform where book enthusiasts can share their thoughts and reviews on various books. Users can create accounts, write reviews, and engage with other readers. The platform aims to foster a love for reading and provide a space for discussions about literature.

title: Weaccess
description: A B2B website created for a company that sells keyless entry systems.
longDescription: Weaccess is a B2B website for a company that sells keyless entry systems. The website provides information about the company's products, showcases their features and benefits, and offers a contact form for potential clients. The design is professional and user-friendly, focusing on clear communication of product value.

title: Candidate
description: Students create profiles for recruiters to discover and connect.
longDescription: Candidate is a professional networking platform designed for students to showcase their skills and experiences. Students can create detailed profiles, upload resumes, and highlight their achievements. Recruiters can search for candidates based on specific criteria, making it easier to find the right talent for job openings.
